/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/opencode-meta-qt.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/opencode-meta-qt.dir/opencode-meta-qt_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencode-meta-qt.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencode-meta-qt.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencode-meta-qt.dir/src/ui/TemplatesWidget.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencode-meta-qt.dir/src/ui/TemplateEditorDialog.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencode-meta-qt.dir/src/ui/ProfilesWidget.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencode-meta-qt.dir/src/ui/ProfileEditorDialog.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencode-meta-qt.dir/src/models/Template.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencode-meta-qt.dir/src/models/Profile.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencode-meta-qt.dir/src/storage/StorageManager.cpp.o" -o opencode-meta-qt  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
